---
title: ""
output:
  html_document:
    theme: null
    toc: false
---

<style>
html,body{
    margin:0;
    padding:0;
    width:100%;
    background:#E3F2FD;
    font-family:Arial,sans-serif;
}

/* R Markdown の余白を削除 */
.main-container{
    max-width:100% !important;
    width:100% !important;
    margin:0 !important;
    padding:0 !important;
}


/* ヘッダー */
header{
width: 100%;
background: #0055b3; 
color: #ffffff;
text-align: center;
padding: 60px 20px;
box-sizing: border-box;
border-bottom: 3px solid #00d4ff;
}

header h1 {
margin: 0;
font-size: 42px;
font-weight: 700;
letter-spacing: 2px;
}

header p {
margin: 12px 0 0 0;
font-size: 18px;
color: #e2e8f0;
font-weight: 300;
letter-spacing: 1px;
}

/* ナビ */
nav { 
background: #0055b3; 
display: flex; 
justify-content: center; 
flex-wrap: wrap; 
position: sticky; 
top: 0; 
z-index: 1000; 
box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}

nav a { 
color: #e2e8f0; 
text-decoration: none; 
padding: 18px 28px; 
font-weight: 500; 
font-size: 15px; 
transition: all 0.3s ease; 
position: relative;
}

nav a:hover { 
color: #ffffff; 
background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
}

nav a.active { 
color: #00d4ff; 
font-weight: 700;
}

nav a.active::after { 
content: ''; 
position: absolute; 
bottom: 0; 
left: 0; 
width: 100%; 
height: 3px; 
background: #00d4ff;
}

/* コンテナとカード */
.container { 
width:90%; 
max-width:1200px; 
margin:40px auto; 
}

.card { 
background:white; 
padding:30px; 
margin-bottom:30px; 
border-radius:12px; 
box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06); 
border-top: 4px solid #0066cc;
}

.card h2 { 
margin-top:0; 
color: #0066cc; 
font-size: 22px; 
border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0; 
padding-bottom: 10px; 
margin-bottom: 20px;
}


/* リンクスタイル */
.card a { 
color: #0066cc; 
text-decoration: none; 
font-weight: 500; 
transition: color 0.3s ease; 
}
.card a:hover { 
color: #00d4ff; 
text-decoration: underline; 
}
.link-list a { 
display: block; 
margin-bottom: 10px;
}

/* フッター */
footer{
background:#0055b3;
color:white;
text-align:center;
padding:25px;
}

header h1 a {
    text-decoration: none; /* 下線を消す */
    color: inherit;        /* 文字色を親要素に合わせる（黒など） */
}

/* スマホ対応 */
@media(max-width:768px){
header{ padding:40px 15px; }
header h1{ font-size:30px; }
nav{ flex-direction:column; }

.hero{ width: 100%; height: 250px; margin: 15px auto;}
.slide { width: 75%; height: auto; }
.slide.active { left: 12.5%; }
.slide.prev { left: -15%; }
.slide.next { left: 40%; }

.container{ width:95%; }
}
</style>

<header>
    <h1><a href="index.html">鷹取研究室</a></h1>
    <p>Wireless Communications & ISAC Laboratory</p>
</header>

<nav>
    <a href="index.html">Home</a>
    <a href="research.html">研究紹介</a>
    <a href="members.html">メンバー</a>
    <a href="equipment.html">研究設備</a>
    <a href="publications.html">研究実績</a>
    <a href="topics.html">Topics</a>
    <a href="contact.html" class="active">Information</a>
</nav>

<div class="container">

<div class="card">
<h2>お問い合わせ</h2>
<p><b>担当教員</b><br>鷹取 泰司 教授</p>
<p><b>E-mail</b><br>takatori@nanzan-u.ac.jp</p>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h2>関連リンク</h2>
<div class= "hover-link">
<a href="https://www.nanzan-u.ac.jp/" target="_blank">≫ 南山大学</a>
</div>
<div class= "hover-link">
<a href="https://www.nanzan-u.ac.jp/nanzan_faculty/fot/tc/029626.html" target="_blank">≫ 南山大学 理工学部</a>
</div>
<div class= "hover-link">
<a href="https://www.nanzan-u.ac.jp/Dept/tc/top.html" target="_blank">≫ 南山大学 理工学部 電子情報工学科</a>
</div>
<div class= "hover-link">
<a href="https://www.nanzan-u.ac.jp/nanzan_faculty/fot/tc/029626.html" target="_blank">≫ 南山大学 教員紹介</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="card">
<h2>所在地</h2>
<p><b>南山大学 理工学部</b><br><br>〒466-8673<br>愛知県名古屋市昭和区山里町18</p>
<iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3262.317840103911!2d136.9628409!3d35.1486932!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x60037abe5d6126cd%3A0xa1f21e9d6f02cd57!2z5Y2X5bGx5aSn5a2mIOWQjeWPpOWxi-OCreODo-ODs-ODkeOCuQ!5e0!3m2!1sja!2sjp!4v1783068327570!5m2!1sja!2sjp" width="100%" height="450" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin">
</iframe>
</div>

</div>

<footer>
&copy; 2026 Takatori Laboratory
</footer>
